creator: pstef@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to David Sebek from comment #16)
> Does your computer freeze, or does it continue booting without any further output showing up?

Yes, it does freeze.

> Does the computer have multiple video or serial console outputs?

No multiple video for sure, I assume also no serial console output whatsoever. It's just the mainboard as seen on TV.

For whatever it's worth, Debian 12 works properly on this setup.
